description: Canonical idea incubator — all ideas, bugs, and improvement requests before GATE_0 entry

status_legend.open: No fate decision yet — requires Team 00 + Nimrod review
status_legend.in_execution: Fate decided AND mandate issued to team; team executing; not yet delivered/confirmed
status_legend.decided: Fully closed — fate executed (immediate done / cancel logged / new_wp registered)
status_legend.lod200_pending: Fate decided (new_wp) — LOD200 not yet authored/approved; WP not yet active in roadmap. Idea remains in pipeline until LOD200 approved.

fate_legend.new_wp: Becomes its own work package (S-P-WP assigned)
fate_legend.append: Added to existing WP scope or tracking item
fate_legend.immediate: Executed directly (< 1 session, no new WP)
fate_legend.cancel: Not pursuing — reason logged to prevent recurrence

delivery_ref_rule.rule: IRON RULE — delivery_ref must be set before status transitions to decided
delivery_ref_rule.fate_immediate_or_append: REQUIRED — must reference the deliverable file or WP gate record confirming execution
delivery_ref_rule.fate_new_wp: REQUIRED — must reference LOD200 approval doc + program registry entry. CANNOT be decided until LOD200 approved. Before LOD200: status=lod200_pending.
delivery_ref_rule.fate_cancel: Set to 'N/A_CANCEL' — no delivery, reason in fate_rationale
delivery_ref_rule.status_in_execution: null — awaiting team delivery; must be filled before closing
